title: Resistente a productos químicos - Elite Mexico
content:
Chemical resistant floor coatings are engineered to protect concrete substrates from chemical spills and exposure which weaken and erode the surface. There are many levels of chemical resistance including intermittent splash and spill, secondary containment (72 hour exposure) and constant immersion. These coatings can be used for flooring and vertical surface protection, secondary containment units and tank linings. Our systems can consist of a combination of any of the following: BPA epoxies, novolac epoxies, polyaspartics and urethanes.
For Elite Mexico chemical resistance guide see “
TD.400 – Industrial Coatings Chemical Resistance Guide
”.
Contact an Elite Mexico technical representative for more details.

pdfs.title: TD.400 – Guía de resistencia química de revestimientos industriales
